_comment: Offline fallback catalog for songs stored in Firebase Storage.
Format: each entry is a path to a bundled song package directory
Production songs come from Firestore (Songs collection) + Firebase Storage.
Lesson songs (NavaSongCatalog) are always available in Dart code.
1. Add the song package folder under assets/songs/<id>/
3. Register the folder in pubspec.yaml under flutter.assets.
To seed Firestore with production songs, run: node scripts/seed_songs.js
